notes: If I enable any sort of anti-aliasing, the game will be stuck at a black screen. Other than that, runs well at 1440p with the open source AMD drivers. May not perform as well as the native or Windows versions, but I have not tested those.
title: Prey

notes: This game is old - from 2006, using id Tech 4 - and it runs flawlessly. I hope I don't mislead anyone thinking that this is the new Prey; this is the original game to bear that name. Runs flawlessly on my system without tweaks and everything as-is.
title: Prey

notes: There's a Linux native installer available, but installing through Proton works absolutely perfectly, is convenient and allows to keep track of playtime etc. Lack of sane alt-tabbing support and requiring editing a configuration file for unlisted resolutions are issues, but these exact issues are also present on Windows so this doesn't impact the platinum rating.
title: Prey

notes: Crashes first time. Runs perfect second time onward. Custom resolution works, runs through the introduction sequence (start to first blue portal) just fine, have not tested further.
title: Prey
